message:
feat(frankenpandas): add 7 README-documented error types to prelude (fd90.202 / br-yujr6)

The README's "Error Architecture" section (lines 829-853) documents 8
typed error enums and explicitly states "All error types are re-exported
through the frankenpandas facade crate". Before this commit, only
JoinError was actually in the prelude — the other 7 (TypeError,
ColumnError, IndexError, FrameError, ExprError, GroupByError, IoError)
were exposed at the top-level only.

User code following the README example:
    use frankenpandas::prelude::*;
    match err { FrameError::CompatibilityRejected(_) => ... }

would not compile, because FrameError wasn't reachable via the prelude
alone. Two existing integration tests (readme_apply_and_transform,
readme_column_manipulation) had inserted local `use frankenpandas::
FrameError;` workarounds inside the test body.

Fix:
- Add the 7 missing error types to crate::prelude
- Remove the two workaround imports from existing tests
- Add readme_error_architecture_compiles_and_runs as a compile-time
  guard that references each error type via the prelude path

Verified: 35 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -218,6 +218,15 @@ pub mod prelude {
         EvidenceLedger,
         Index,
         IndexLabel,
+        // Error types (matches README "Error Architecture" section lines 829-853 —
+        // all 8 typed error enums exposed for pattern matching).
+        ColumnError,
+        ExprError,
+        FrameError,
+        GroupByError,
+        IndexError,
+        IoError,
+        TypeError,
         // Join (types + functions, matches README Recipes + Merge: Advanced Options)
         AsofDirection,
         JoinError,
